LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITIONER'S PETITION CONFIRMING ARBITRATOR'S AWARD (SUBMITTED ON 3/24/2003) -- GRANTED. (DEW/301)

LAW AND MOTION, 301, MOTION APPLICATION OF PETITION CONFIRMING ARBITRATOR'S AWARD, SUBMITTED ON MAR-24-2003 BY DIANE E. WICK. COUNSEL SUBMITTED THE CERTIFICATE OF SERVICE TO THE COURT. MINI MINUTES:

Dave L. Neville, Esq. of LAW OFFICES OF DAVE L. NEVILLE 786-5181, for petitioner Wyatt Landesmann moving to Confirm Arbitrator'S Award

RULING:
No other appearance on this matter. Counsel submitted the certificate of service to the Court. The Court took PETITIONER WYATT LANDESMANN's Petition Confirming Arbitrator'S Award under submission. (DEW/301/JU) Reporter: Candace Yount, #2737
